events.label: assistant
events.text: I’ll inspect the gas monitor image, read the four channels, then write the required JSON directly to `/app/answer.json`.

events.label: assistant
events.text: I read the monitor as O2 20.9%, LEL 16%, H2S 1 ppm, and CO 5 ppm. I’m writing the failed authorization result because the LEL is above the confined-space entry threshold.
